your_position.target: $195,000 base salary with equity refresh - positions you in market range while acknowledging company stage
your_position.reservation_point: $185,000 base salary - represents 6% increase and minimum to stay competitive without feeling undervalued
your_position.batna: FAANG offer at $210K base + RSUs - represents 20% salary increase with additional equity upside
your_position.anchor_recommendation: Open at $200-205K base plus equity refresh, citing market data and retention concerns
your_position.rationale: Strong anchor above your target leaves room for negotiation while the FAANG offer validates this range. Starting high but reasonable given market comps shows you've done homework.

their_estimated_position.likely_target: Retain you at $180-190K range to balance budget while showing meaningful increase
their_estimated_position.likely_reservation: Up to $195-200K if absolutely necessary to prevent departure to FAANG
their_estimated_position.likely_batna: Hire external replacement at $190-200K plus onboarding costs and productivity loss
constraints: Series C budget allocation and compensation bands
Precedent concerns with other team members
incentives: Competitive hiring market making replacements expensive

zopa.estimated_range: $185K - $195K base salary zone with equity as additional variable

leverage_points.factor: Peer departure precedent and salary data
leverage_points.how_to_use_it: Reference specific peer salaries ($195-205K) as market validation - creates internal equity pressure they must address
Highlight that external hires cost $190-200K plus 3-6 months productivity loss - makes your ask seem cost-effective
They may push for delayed effective date or equity-heavy package to manage current budget constraints

risk_factors.risk: Setting precedent that triggers other retention negotiations
risk_factors.mitigation: Emphasize unique circumstances - external offer, peer departures, and your specific value delivery

risk_factors.risk: Manager lacks authority for your target range
risk_factors.mitigation: Ask early about approval process and decision-making authority to avoid false negotiations

risk_factors.risk: Company calls your bluff on external offer
risk_factors.mitigation: Be prepared to actually leave - don't negotiate unless genuinely willing to walk

tradeable_issues.issue: Title progression or senior level designation
Performance bonus or retention bonus structure
Flexible work arrangements or additional PTO
